title: cursor-vibe-starter: A reference workspace and prompt-template library for AI-directed security engineering
description: An opinionated Cursor IDE configuration, twelve prompt templates with a strict five-part structure, and a complete worked example: a FastAPI security microservice with JWT auth, Redis rate limiting, structured JSON logging, and a passing pytest suite. Includes a `loc_analysis.py` script that parses the repo's own git log to break out [ai] vs [manual] vs [mixed] commits as a measured-not-claimed productivity record.
